creator: tmseck@netcologne.de
text:
- update to 2.6.STABLE15 and add all applicable vendor patches that were
  available up to 2007-09-03
  (see http://www.squid-cache.org/Versions/v2/2.6/changesets/)
- add a substitution rule to the post-patch target that hints that this
  version of squid was built from patched sources
- update the ICAP bootstrap patch to adapt to the changes that arose from
  the fact that the configure script was generated with autoconf 2.61 instead
  of 2.59

Fix: Apply this patch:
